meaning: n.(药物或营养素的)生物药效率,生物利用度
examples: AIM: To observe the relative bioavailability of domestic or import roxithromycin.
OBJECTIVE To study the relative bioavailability of domestic and imported valsartan capsule.
Objective To study the relative bioavailability of cefadroxil dispersible tablet and granule.
The lack of dependence of this effect of aspirin on its systemic bioavailability suggests that it is platelet-mediated.
There is also a big difference on synthetic vs natural when it comes to bioavailability, absorption, and assimilation in the body.
